$comment: Gemini CLI hook config. Commands are wrapped in `bash -c` with a GEMINI_PROJECT_DIR -> CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR -> $PWD fallback, mirroring the .codex/hooks.json pattern, because some Gemini CLI launchers (esp. Gemini Desktop / app-bundled launches) don't propagate GEMINI_PROJECT_DIR to hook subprocesses, which collapses the unwrapped path to /.gemini/... and yields exit 127. The Praxis dotfile loader (PRAXIS_HOST_WORKSPACE_ROOT or CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR) provides the same anchor for the policy registry on the inside.
